description: A sensor monitoring a pregnant cow's behavior indicates she has been in labor for an extended period, suggesting a difficult birth.

nodes.task_description: Receive an alert for a prolonged labor event.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies the cow and confirms the duration of labor from sensor data.

nodes.task_description: Send a high-priority alert to the rancher to immediately check on the cow.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends an SMS with the cow's ID and location.

nodes.task_description: Provide a link to a video tutorial on how to assist with common calving difficulties.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides a relevant instructional resource.
